meta.policy: Bench = pre-vetted research queue only. No automatic buys, no sector 'quota' fills. Arm a limit only after: (1) company-specific catalyst, (2) thesis line written in ledger, (3) liquidity gate allows adds.
meta.last_review_suggestion: Sunday journal — pick one bench name per month to deep-read; ignore the rest.

sectors.name: Space / Logistics
sectors.context: You already hold PL + RKLB; ASTS on watch. Bench adds optionality without diluting conviction count.

candidates.name: Lockheed Martin
candidates.hook: Prime / classified backlog — stabilizer when pure-plays gap on sentiment
candidates.catalyst_watch: DoD budget · classified awards · space division mix

candidates.name: Redwire
candidates.hook: Space infrastructure components — smaller cap, higher idiosyncratic risk

sectors.name: Bio-Engineering
sectors.context: TMO + gene-edit trio (BEAM, NTLA, CRSP). Bench = large-cap derisk or adjacent modality.

candidates.name: Regeneron
candidates.hook: Antibody engine + cash-rich — ballast vs clinical-stage CRISPR names

candidates.name: Vertex
candidates.hook: CF monopoly cash — use as quality bar when sizing speculative bio

sectors.name: Infrastructure
sectors.context: ASML, VRT, COHR, AMAT held. Bench = semi-cap equipment / networking depth.

candidates.name: Lam Research
candidates.catalyst_watch: China export rules · NAND cap spend

candidates.name: KLA
candidates.hook: Process control — highest margins in WFE

sectors.name: Global Issue Radar
sectors.context: NTR + FCX = deliberate concentration. Bench = regime hedges / adjacent commodities, not 'three more stocks'.

candidates.name: Mosaic
candidates.hook: Fertilizer peer to NTR — potash/phosphate spread plays

candidates.name: Global X Copper Miners ETF
candidates.hook: Broad copper exposure without single-mine risk (pairs with FCX thesis)
candidates.catalyst_watch: China stimulus · grid spend · scrap tightness

candidates.name: SPDR Gold Shares
candidates.hook: Liquidity / currency stress hedge — not a 'stock pick'
